title: Incorrect result for LEFT JOIN
description:
mrigger added on 2020-09-30 12:47:38:
Consider the following test case:

CREATE TABLE t0(c0);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT NULL AND NULL FROM t0;
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (NULL);
SELECT * FROM v0 LEFT JOIN t0 ON v0.c0; -- expected: {NULL|NULL}, actual: {}

Unexpectedly, the row with NULL values is not fetched. I found this based on the latest check-in [ce6d8d62].
drh added on 2020-09-30 15:46:49:
This problem has been in SQLite since at least version 3.0.0 (2004-06-18) which
is as far back as I checked.
The problem is in the query flattener.
During initial processing, the "ON v0.c0" term of the query is marked with
the EP_FromJoin flag to indicate that it originates in the ON or USING clause
of a LEFT JOIN and then it is added to the WHERE clause.  The EP_FromJoin flag
causes the special processing that is needed to correctly handle ON/USING
clause terms.
The query flattener comes along later and replaces "v0.c0" with the
"NULL and NULL" expression.  It transfers the EP_FromJoin mark from the
original "v0.c0" over to "NULL and NULL", as it should.  But it was not
putting that mark on the subcomponents - the individual NULL terms - 
of the new expression.  When the WHERE clause is later broken apart into
multiple AND-connected terms for analysis, the EP_FromJoin mark is lost
from the NULL terms, and they look like they originated with a "WHERE NULL"
clause.  Hence, SQLite was computing an answer based on the misunderstanding
that the original query contained a "WHERE NULL" clause.
The fix is to ensure that EP_FromJoin mark gets replicated onto all nodes
of the compression expression - not just the top level node -
when doing expression substitution in the query flattener.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 1.1);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON v1.c2 = t1.c2;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with NULL values not fetched correctly
